entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the crop studied for drought adaptation strategies

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Environmental stress that adversely affects crop production

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of chickpea genotypes to adapt and maintain growth under drought stress

entities.name: ROOT BIOMASS
entities.description: The mass of the root system, higher in tolerant genotypes at the vegetative stage

entities.name: ROOT LENGTH
entities.description: The length of the root system, higher in tolerant genotypes at the vegetative stage

entities.name: ROOT SURFACE AREA
entities.description: The total surface area of the root system, higher in tolerant genotypes at the vegetative stage

entities.name: ROOT DIAMETER
entities.description: The thickness of the root, higher in tolerant genotypes at the reproductive stage

entities.name: SHOOT BIOMASS
entities.description: The mass of the shoot system, overall higher in tolerant genotypes under drought stress

entities.name: RNA-SEQ
entities.description: A transcriptomic method used to identify differentially expressed genes

entities.name: DEGS
entities.description: Differentially expressed genes identified in response to drought stress

entities.name: GO ANALYSIS
entities.description: Gene ontology analysis used to reveal enrichment of biological categories

entities.name: CELLULAR PROCESS
entities.description: A biological category enriched in DEGs according to GO analysis

entities.name: METABOLIC PROCESS
entities.description: A biological category enriched in DEGs according to GO analysis

entities.name: RESPONSE TO STIMULUS
entities.description: A biological category enriched in DEGs according to GO analysis

entities.name: RESPONSE TO ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: A biological category enriched in DEGs according to GO analysis

entities.name: RESPONSE TO HORMONES
entities.description: A biological category enriched in DEGs according to GO analysis

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTION FACTORS
entities.description: Stress-responsive genes robustly upregulated in tolerant genotypes

entities.name: KINASES
entities.description: Stress-responsive genes robustly upregulated in tolerant genotypes

entities.name: ROS SIGNALING
entities.description: Genes involved in reactive oxygen species signaling and scavenging, upregulated in tolerant genotypes

entities.name: TRANSPORTERS
entities.description: Genes involved in transport, robustly upregulated in tolerant genotypes

entities.name: ROOT NODULATION
entities.description: Genes involved in root nodulation, robustly upregulated in tolerant genotypes

entities.name: OXYLIPIN BIOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: Genes involved in oxylipin biosynthesis, robustly upregulated in tolerant genotypes

entities.name: HORMONE SIGNALING GENES
entities.description: Genes involved in hormone signaling, showing activation or repression

entities.name: HORMONE BIOSYNTHESIS GENES
entities.description: Genes involved in hormone biosynthesis, showing activation or repression

entities.name: VEGETATIVE STAGE
entities.description: A developmental stage of chickpea where root biomass, length, and surface area were compared

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE STAGE
entities.description: A developmental stage of chickpea where root diameter and shoot biomass were compared
